blocker: Trained legs need .venv-hud 3.12 + forked Qwen + HUD Tinker credits; SFT leg additionally SDK-blocked (hud.TrainingClient has no supervised token-target step). Offline proxy ceiling + full scaffold delivered; trained numbers left blank, not faked.
